summary: Phase 2 Navigation & UX validation complete. All major Phase 2 features verified working: sidebar multi-expand, Settings & Growth section (Marketing merged in), mobile nav Risk direct tab, More sheet with 3 grouped sections, Audit Log empty state copy. Phase 1 regressions: theme toggle works, light mode main content bg fixed from iter_109. Backend APIs slow/hanging prevents rendering of empty states on Revenue/Decisions/Alerts pages — empty state copy verified by source code review instead.

critical.issue: APIs hang indefinitely (>12 seconds, no response). Pages stuck in loading state — empty state UIs never rendered. Same persistent issue from iter_108/109.

integration_issues.issue: Empty state copy cannot be verified in rendered UI because backend APIs hang indefinitely, keeping pages in loading state. Source code review confirms copy is correctly implemented.

action_items: CRITICAL (persisting from iter_108): Fix backend API timeouts — /intelligence/watchtower, /integrations/crm/deals, /integrations/accounting/summary, /cognition/overview all hang >12s. Pages stuck in loading state, empty states never render.
MINOR: Empty state copy for Revenue, Decisions, Alerts could not be verified in rendered UI due to API timeouts — main agent should self-test once backend APIs are fixed.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend API performance: Multiple APIs hang indefinitely causing perpetual loading states. This is a critical UX issue beyond Phase 2 scope but needs addressing.
RevenuePage.js: EnterpriseContactGate wraps content but user can access /revenue — gate appears permissive for this user tier.
DashboardLayout.js line 252: style={{ background: 'var(--biqc-bg, #0F1720)' }} — light mode fix confirmed working (main bg shows #F0F4F8 in light mode). Bug from iter_109 is FIXED.

MobileNav.js: data-testid for More sheet items uses data-testid={`more-${item.label.toLowerCase().replace(/[\s&]/g, '-')}`} — Market & Positioning becomes 'more-market---positioning' (& → -, space → -). Selector might need adjustment in future tests.
DashboardLayout.js: Auto-expand useEffect has eslint-disable-line comment but navSections is not in deps — this is acceptable since navSections is effectively constant per render.

success_rate.frontend: 88% (15/17 Phase 2 features verified; 2 unverifiable due to backend API hangs)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 sidebar multi-expand, mobile nav Risk tab, More sheet grouping all verified PASS. Phase 1 theme toggle regression also PASS (light mode fix applied). Key unresolved issue: multiple backend APIs hang indefinitely, preventing empty state rendering on Revenue/Decisions/Alerts pages. Empty state copy is correct in source code but can't be seen in UI until APIs are fixed. Audit Log empty state ('governance trail') DID render correctly since it uses Supabase directly, not the hung APIs.

backend_api_hang.symptom: Revenue page shows 'Loading revenue data...' for >12 seconds; Decisions shows 'Scanning for decision triggers...'; Alerts shows 'syncing...' indefinitely
backend_api_hang.root_cause: Backend APIs (/integrations/crm/deals, /integrations/accounting/summary, /cognition/overview, /intelligence/watchtower) do not respond within reasonable time. Could be: (1) long-running DB queries, (2) external integration timeouts, (3) infrastructure issues
backend_api_hang.impact: Users see perpetual loading spinners instead of empty states with actionable copy. Empty state UX improvements from Phase 2 are effectively invisible.
backend_api_hang.fix_suggestion: Add request timeout (e.g., 5-8s) to backend API handlers or frontend axios calls. Return empty/null data if external services don't respond. Ensure Promise.allSettled resolves even on timeout.

test_false_negative_more_sheet.symptom: Test reported FAIL for 'Intelligence'/'Execution' in More sheet sections
test_false_negative_more_sheet.root_cause: CSS `text-transform: uppercase` class applied to section labels makes Playwright's inner_text() return 'INTELLIGENCE'/'EXECUTION' (uppercase). String check for 'Intelligence'/'Execution' (title case) failed.
test_false_negative_more_sheet.fix: Use `.lower()` or case-insensitive comparison in test assertions: `'intelligence' in body_text.lower()`
test_false_negative_more_sheet.actual_status: PASS — Screenshot confirms all 3 sections (INTELLIGENCE, EXECUTION, SETTINGS) are present and properly grouped
